mapper.select: select group_id, group_name, default_discount from bh_designer_group order by group_id desc
mapper.insert: insert into bh_designer_group (group_name, default_discount, create_time, update_time) values (#{groupName}, #{defaultDiscount}, now(), now())
mapper.update: update bh_designer_group set group_name = #{groupName}, default_discount = #{defaultDiscount}, update_time = now() where group_id = #{groupId}
